name: Tatiana
role: Birthday · May 23, 2026 · ~40 guests · West Roxbury MA backyard

handling.tone: Text-preferred active communicator. She explicitly said 'Please text me.' Honor it. Don't force phone calls. Crisp questions, fast turnaround.
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: short bullet questions, lowercase, no terminal punctuation. She's at work — respect time-of-day. Replied 'Hi / Yes' which is gold; build from there.
handling.context: Inbound Apr 18 from FB Lead Form — backyard birthday for ~40, only 4 weeks out. Asked to text. Answered 'Hi / Yes' to last cadence. No last name captured — pull from Close.

context_anchors: Last reply 'Hi / Yes' — warmest signal she gave
Last name not captured — pull from Close

lead.source: FB Lead Form — VIDEO RODS WEDDING & FACELESS
lead.next_move: SMS with 3 crisp questions: drop-off vs buffet vs hosted; cuisine direction; bar yes/no

enrichment.identity_notes: Single first name only. Could be Brazilian, Eastern European, or Hispanic. West Roxbury demographics are mixed — traditionally Irish-Catholic, increasingly Latino/Caribbean.
win_angles: 'Hi / Yes' reply is the entry point — build from there
Right-size: 40 + backyard + 4 weeks = drop-off or light buffet ($25-40/pp)
nepq_openers: Continuation: 'Hey Tatiana — perfect. Three quick questions: (1) Drop-off / light buffet / full hosted? (2) Brazilian BBQ vibe, classic American, or open? (3) Bar — alcohol or just drinks?'
Anchor: 'For 40 guests in a backyard, drop-off ~$X, light buffet ~$Y, full hosted ~$Z. Pick a direction and I'll send a tight quote in 24h.'
enrichment.strategic_note: Warmest small-event lead in the batch. She's actively engaged, text-preferred, in-zone, with a specific date and venue. Don't overthink — be fast and clear. Three crisp questions, get answers via text within 48h, send quote, close in days not weeks.

comms.summary: 'Andre I'm at work right now but I can talk at 4pm it's ok?'

notes: 4-week clock is real; chase the 'Hi / Yes' within 24h
Don't pile on touches — short crisp questions only
